input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.3.3.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.3.3.6
            TITLE: gloves

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.3.3.6: Gloves
VE.3.3.6 Gloves 
Gloves made from Flame Resistant Material.   
Gloves of all leather construction or fire retardant gloves constructed using leather palms with 
no insulating Flame Resistant Material underneath are not acceptable.

final_answer: Gloves made from Flame Resistant Material. Gloves of all leather construction or fire retardant gloves constructed using leather palms with no insulating Flame Resistant Material underneath are not acceptable.
